title: ISTUN Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences, Department of Chemical Engineering Faculty Member Dr. Gülşah Yaman Uzunoğlu's TUBITAK 1001 Project has been entitled to be supported.
content:
ISTUN Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences, Department of Chemical Engineering Faculty Member Dr. Gülşah Yaman Uzunoğlu's TUBITAK 1001 Project has been entitled to be supported.

Pazartesi

ISTUN Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences, Department of Chemical Engineering Faculty Member Dr. Gülşah Yaman Uzunoğlu's TUBITAK 1001 Project has been entitled to be supported.

TÜBİTAK 1001 Project The name of the project supported within the scope of "1001- Scientific and Technological Research Projects Support Program" in the 2nd period of 2023 is "Development of High Performance Nanohybrid Gel Polymer Electrolytes for Lithium Metal Batteries by In Situ Polymerization Method Using Functionalized Hexagonal Boron Nitride Nanoplates"

We congratulate our faculty member and wish her continued success.
